verse.name: v1
verse.lines: On the wings of a snow white dove God sends His pure sweet love On the wings of a snow white dove To take His eagles home

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I lived in a world of sin and shame, That caused me grief and pain I tried so hard to be free, Searching for my true identity Didn't know I came from eternity, Until God came and revealed it to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I knew somehow, I was born to fly; Way up in the sky But somehow I couldn't set, my wings free But since that day I heard His Voice And made Him my Heavenly Choice By His Grace I can say I've been set free

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now behold what manner of love The father has bestowed upon us That we might be called the sons of God Wherever He bids us we will go Wherever He leads we will follow For whom the son sets free is free indeed
